# IWD Miami Services & Construction

> Licensed Florida multi-trade contractor (CGC). One team for construction, roofing, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, weatherization, outdoor, and specialty work. Florida Energy authorized. Service areas across Florida.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://iwdmiami.com/): Florida multi-trade contractor hub and free quote
- [Services](https://iwdmiami.com/services/): All service silos and trade overview
- [Locations](https://iwdmiami.com/locations/): Florida cities and local service pages
- [Questions / FAQs](https://iwdmiami.com/questions/): Homeowner FAQ library by trade
- [Contact](https://iwdmiami.com/contact/): Free quote and contact form
- [About](https://iwdmiami.com/about/): Company background and credentials

## Service silos

- [Construction](https://iwdmiami.com/construction/): Kitchen, bath, ADU, basement, additions
- [Roofing](https://iwdmiami.com/roofing/): Replacement, repair, storm damage, siding, gutters
- [HVAC](https://iwdmiami.com/hvac/): Heat pumps, AC, boilers, ductless, high-efficiency systems
- [Plumbing](https://iwdmiami.com/plumbing/): Sewer, water heaters, gas lines, emergency plumbing
- [Electrical](https://iwdmiami.com/electrical/): Panel upgrades, EV chargers, generators
- [Weatherization](https://iwdmiami.com/weatherization/): Insulation, air sealing, Florida Energy programs
- [Outdoor](https://iwdmiami.com/outdoor/): Decks, windows, doors, landscaping, paving
- [Specialty](https://iwdmiami.com/specialty/): Flooring, tile, painting, handyman, smart home

## Resources & programs

- [Florida Energy rebates](https://iwdmiami.com/resources/florida-energy-rebates/): State rebate overview
- [Florida Building Code](https://iwdmiami.com/resources/florida-building-code/): Code reference hub
- [Programs](https://iwdmiami.com/programs/): Florida Energy, IRA 25C, heat loan, MOR-EV
- [Blog](https://iwdmiami.com/blog/): Editorial hub (articles archive removed; new content coming)

## Discovery

- [Sitemap index](https://iwdmiami.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap index
- [Location cities sitemap](https://iwdmiami.com/location-cities-sitemap.xml): All Florida city pages
